keyFeatures.en: Built-in music theory and chord progression tools
keyFeatures.zh: 内置音乐理论和和弦进行工具

description.en: Basic features including real-time collaboration, built-in music theory tools, and unlimited song saves.
description.zh: 基本功能包括实时协作、内置音乐理论工具和无限歌曲保存。

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support

targetAudience.zh: 音乐人、作曲家和音乐制作人

positioning.en: A collaborative platform for musicians to create and share music
positioning.zh: 一个供音乐人协作创作和分享音乐的平台
